core_beliefs.explanation: 公共选择理论核心立场

core_beliefs.source: Political decisions are rarely made with the intention of helping anyone but the one making the decision
core_beliefs.explanation: 公共选择理论对政治家的分析

core_beliefs.belief: 无政府是理想但政府对普通人必要
core_beliefs.source: Anarchy is the ideal for ideal men; for ordinary men, some government is necessary
core_beliefs.explanation: 布坎南对无政府的平衡观点

core_beliefs.source: in the absence of moral or constitutional constraints democracies will finance some share of public consumption from debt issue
core_beliefs.explanation: 布坎南对民主赤字的批判

core_beliefs.source: Questions about what are good rules of the game are in the domain of social philosophy
politics as exchange (公共选择理论框架)
core_beliefs.explanation: 布坎南的方法论个人主义

core_beliefs.source: no self-respecting economist would claim that increases in the minimum wage increase employment
core_beliefs.explanation: 布坎南对最低工资的批判

core_beliefs.source: I certainly have a great deal of affinity with Austrian economics
core_beliefs.explanation: 布坎南自认与奥地利学派亲和

key_themes: 无政府是理想但政府必要
